highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “Bear case tomorrow: 6374 needs to fail to get a real dip going.” and “Below 6374 we could sell quite dramatically".
While its nice to expect a certain type of price action, trading it is a different matter, and as readers know, most my entries occur via Failed Breakdowns.

If we are knifing, wait for the Failed Breakdown of today’s 6365 low (perhaps down to 6356 but doesn’t need to go that deep).” Before Apple earnings yesterday we lost 6374 again, sold to 6359, and rallied to 6400 yesterday afternoon.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll discuss some of the setups we saw this week (we saw many Failed Breakdown variants including “double dip” Failed Breakdowns and “Level Reclaims”) These are important to know.

post_title: Biggest Red Week For SPX Since May 19th. Will It Get Bought? August 4th Plan
